commit_scope: Add Form/BML-native circle discovery mechanics so groups are discoverable only by offer, joinable only by matching invitation, and removable from the visible discovery set when observed invasion reaches circle consensus.

local_validation.notes: Integrated from the parallel circle-discovery worker lane after rebasing this parent branch onto origin/main. Focused source proof returned 32767 with 1 ok, 0 divergent. Focused binary artifact proof returned 32767 with 1 ok, 0 divergent.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this combined branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: Production verification is pending until PR checks pass, the branch is merged, deployment completes, and public verification runs.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Circle discovery can be expressed and verified inside Form/BML: offers produce the visible discovery set, private offers stay absent, matching invitations gate joinability, and valid refusal removes a circle from the visible set only after both invasion and consensus are observed.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/channel-flow.fk form-stdlib/circle.fk form-stdlib/tests/circle-discovery-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/channel-flow.fk form-stdlib/circle.fk form-stdlib/tests/circle-discovery-band.fk

phase_gate.notes: Local source and binary sibling-kernel proof are complete; CI, PR review, merge, deploy, and public verification remain pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/circle.fk now extends the landed registered-blueprint circle surface with discovery-set filtering, discoverable membership lookup, observed-invasion consensus naming, and refusal-gated discovery removal.

form/form-stdlib/tests/circle-discovery-band.fk proves offered circles become visible, private offers stay absent, matching invitations gate joining, wrong invitee/circle invitations fail, and discovery removal requires both invasion and passing consensus.

Source sibling-kernel proof: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/channel-flow.fk form-stdlib/circle.fk form-stdlib/tests/circle-discovery-band.fk -> 32767; 1 ok, 0 divergent.

Binary sibling-kernel proof: cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/channel-flow.fk form-stdlib/circle.fk form-stdlib/tests/circle-discovery-band.fk -> 32767; 1 ok, 0 divergent.
No new Blueprint IDs were added in this lane; the implementation reuses the registered circle cells now on origin/main plus existing channel-interface modes.
